title: Woods and Mires
body: **Woods and Mires** adds new biomes based on Nordic nature: pine forests, mires and fells together with their variants. It also adds new foliage to vanilla biomes. ## Requirements - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (also works with [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) in 1.19+) - [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) is needed to generate the biomes in the world (MC 1.18+) - 1.16 versions required [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin), but it is no longer needed.
